## Overview

`defenseclaw status` — Show DefenseClaw status.

## Reference

<!-- BEGIN AUTOGEN:cli_py:status -->
<!-- Do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `make docs-gen`. -->

### Synopsis

```bash
defenseclaw status [OPTIONS]
```

### Description

Show DefenseClaw status

Show DefenseClaw status.

    Displays environment, sandbox health, scanner availability,
    enforcement counts, and activity summary.

<!-- END AUTOGEN:cli_py:status -->

## Usage

### Quick health check

```bash
defenseclaw status
```

The command prints the local DefenseClaw status that the Python CLI can derive from config, scanner state, and sidecar health.

For deeper problem diagnosis use [`doctor`](/docs-site/cli/commands/doctor).
